title: Minimalist Mangrove SMP Season 3: Modded.
description: This is the minimalist version of the Modpack for the Mangrove SMP Season 3. This Modpack includes very few preformace and graphical mods but it has voice chat and Arcanus (a mod about wizardry). Have fun playing Mangrove SMP Season 3: Modded.
body: This is the minimalist Modpack for the Mangrove SMP Season 3. This Modpack includes voice chat, Netherite Extras, and Arcanus: Legacy.(A mod about MAGIC) We recomend you use this modpack if you only want the bare essentials to play on the server due to it not including any graphical or preformance mods but feel free to add whatever client side mods you want as long as they apply to the rules. Have fun playing Mangrove SMP Season 3: Modded.
